archetype: Archetype 1 (Organic & Earthy) mixed with Archetype 6 (Vibrant Play) for Dopamine-Inducing Brightness

hierarchy.h1: text-5xl md:text-6xl lg:text-7xl font-black tracking-tighter text-neutral-dark_green
hierarchy.label: text-xs font-bold uppercase tracking-[0.2em] text-neutral-text_muted

spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Mobile-First. Padding scales 2x normal.

button.primary: bg-secondary text-white font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-secondary-hover hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-[0_8px_24px_rgba(255,85,0,0.4)] transition-all duration-300
button.outline: bg-transparent border-2 border-neutral-dark_green text-neutral-dark_green font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 hover:bg-neutral-dark_green hover:text-white transition-all duration-300

card.product: bg-white rounded-2xl border border-black/5 p-4 flex flex-col gap-4 shadow-sm hover:shadow-[0_12px_40px_rgba(149,214,0,0.15)] hover:border-primary transition-all duration-300 group cursor-pointer
card.subscription_tier: bg-white rounded-3xl border-2 border-transparent p-8 flex flex-col gap-6 shadow-lg hover:border-primary transition-all duration-300 relative overflow-hidden cursor-pointer

header.style: sticky top-0 z-50 bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-black/5 transition-all duration-300

inputs.style: bg-neutral-muted border border-border rounded-xl px-4 py-3 focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-primary focus:border-transparent transition-all duration-200

badges.style: bg-primary text-black text-xs font-black uppercase tracking-wider px-3 py-1 rounded-full

motion_and_interactions.hover: All interactive elements must lift (-translate-y-1) and cast a color-tinted ambient shadow.
motion_and_interactions.staggered_lists: Use Framer Motion to stagger entrance of product cards (0.1s delay each).
motion_and_interactions.image_zoom: Images inside cards must scale-105 on group-hover inside an overflow-hidden container.
motion_and_interactions.marquee: Use react-fast-marquee for a vibrant 'Living Texture' banner featuring Nigerian ingredients in bold outline text.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Fade in and slide up slightly on mount.

hero.description: High-end product photography of a premium monthly subscription box filled with fresh Nigerian groceries, yams, plantains, and spices.
hero.alt_text: Brianna Box - Premium Nigerian Grocery Delivery

backgrounds.description: Abstract modern background pattern featuring subtle African Ankara geometric motifs.

products.description: Colorful spices in buckets (Egusi, Ogbono representations)

lifestyle.description: Woman preparing food at an outdoor market stall (Authentic Nigerian Market Vibe)

testing_requirements.attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid. Format: kebab-case, role-based (e.g., data-testid='add-to-cart-button', data-testid='category-filter-spices').

instructions_to_main_agent: Use Tailwind CSS for all custom layouts. Do not rely heavily on Shadcn 'Card' components for the main marketing landing page; use raw divs with Bento Grid strategy for asymmetrical flow.
For user inputs, modals, and the cart drawer, deeply customize Shadcn UI components. Ensure buttons match the vibrant orange/lime green theme.
Implement a marquee running across the page with words like 'EGUSI • STOCKFISH • OHA LEAF • PLANTAINS' using a large outline text style.
Set the typography globally using Cabinet Grotesk for headings and Satoshi for body text.
Include a 'Monthly Box Builder' section showcasing Starter, Family, and Premium tiers.
Ensure the hero section uses the generated subscription box image prominently alongside bold, massive typography.
Create an AI Recipe Assistant floating action button that opens a chat interface styled in the brand's dark green.
Make the background of the app #FAF9F6, not pure white, and use the provided ankara texture as a subtle, low-opacity (e.g., 5-10%) background overlay in key sections like the Hero or Footer.
CRITICAL: Include data-testid attributes on every button, link, and input.
